underlying_goal: Refactor frontend code to change categoryGenerationTemplateIdList from a string array to an object array, rename the field, and understand the impact of the change
friction_detail: Claude initially included backend server-side changes in scope when user only wanted frontend analysis.
brief_summary: User wanted to refactor a field from ID array to object array across multiple frontend files, with discussion on naming and design; Claude completed the changes which were then stashed for later use.
